channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [STARHEALTH] Star Health and Allied Insurance Receives IRDAI Approval for Transmission of Shares Held by Late Rakesh Jhunjhunwala
item.description:
Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited has received approval from the Insurance Regulatory and Development Authority of India (IRDAI) for the proposed transmission of 8,28,82,958 equity shares held by Late Mr. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala in the Company. The transmission will be carried out in accordance with the probate granted in the name of Late Mr. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala.

  • Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Limited received IRDAI approval for transmission of shares held by Late Mr. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala.
  • The transmission will be carried out according to the probate granted in the name of Late Mr. Rakesh Jhunjhunwala.
  • The total number of equity shares for transmission is 8,28,82,958.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Star Health and Allied Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [GPPL] Gujarat Pipavav Port Ltd Reports Q4 FY 26 Operational Data
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Gujarat Pipavav Port Ltd has released its operational data for the quarter and financial year ended 31st March 2026. The company handled a total of 668,000 TEUs in containers, 2.90 Mn MT in dry bulk, and 1.59 Mn MT in liquid cargo. The number of container trains handled was 1,747, with 414,000 TEUs handled on train. The Ro Ro units handled were 229,000. This information was disclosed under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 and can be found on the company's website.

  • Q4 FY 26 cargo volume: 668,000 TEUs in containers, 2.90 Mn MT in dry bulk, and 1.59 Mn MT in liquid cargo
  • 1,747 container trains handled in Q4 FY 26
  • 414,000 TEUs handled on train in Q4 FY 26
  • 229,000 Ro Ro units handled in Q4 FY 26
  • Disclosure under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT PIPAVAV PORT LTD. | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [ADANIENT] Adani Enterprises Ltd Approves Conversion of Partly Paid-up Rights Equity Shares
item.description:
Adani Enterprises Ltd has approved the conversion of partly paid-up Rights Equity Shares into fully paid-up equity shares. This decision was made during the Rights Issue Committee of the Board of Directors meeting held on April 6, 2026. The conversion applies to 20,583 shares that were 75% paid-up and to 2,33,470 shares that were 50% paid-up. The conversion is only for Call Monies received through modes other than the ASBA facility for the First Call Money and Second and Final Call Money, as applicable.

  • Adani Enterprises Ltd approves conversion of partly paid-up Rights Equity Shares
  • Conversion applies to 20,583 shares that were 75% paid-up and to 2,33,470 shares that were 50% paid-up
  • Conversion is only for Call Monies received through modes other than the ASBA facility
  • Decision was made during the Rights Issue Committee of the Board of Directors meeting held on April 6, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADANI ENTERPRISES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [YASTF] Yash Trading & Finance Ltd Approves Draft Letter of Offer for Right Issue of Equity Shares
item.description:
On 06th April, 2026, Yash Trading & Finance Ltd's Right Issue Committee met and considered, approved, and took on record the Draft Letter of Offer (DLOF) for the proposed Right Issue of equity shares. The Committee also authorized the filing of the DLOF with BSE Limited. The meeting, which started at 9.00 P.M and ended at 9.50 P.M, also authorized designated officials to make necessary modifications, finalize the document, and undertake all necessary acts in this regard. The Committee's decisions are pursuant to the provisions of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Yash Trading & Finance Ltd's Right Issue Committee approved the Draft Letter of Offer (DLOF) for the proposed Right Issue of equity shares.
  • The Committee authorized the filing of the DLOF with BSE Limited.
  • Designated officials were authorized to make necessary modifications and finalize the document.
  • The Committee's decisions are pursuant to the provisions of Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.
  • The Right Issue committee meeting commenced on 9.00 P.M and concluded at 9.50 P.M.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: YASH TRADING & FINANCE LTD. | Category: Right Issue

item.title: [FUSION] Fusion Finance Ltd Receives Trading Approvals for 3626 Equity Shares
item.description:
Fusion Finance Ltd has announced that the trading approvals for 3626 equity shares have been received from BSE Limited and the National Stock Exchange of India Limited. These shares, which were converted from partly paid-up equity shares into fully paid-up equity shares on a rights issue basis, were initially rejected by the depositories during the corporate action process. However, the corporate action has now been successfully completed. The shares are available for trading on both the NSE and BSE under ISIN INE139R01012 with effect from Tuesday, April 07, 2026. These shares rank pari passu with the existing Equity Shares of the Company. The information is available on the company's website at www.fusionfin.com.

  • Fusion Finance Ltd receives trading approvals for 3626 equity shares
  • Shares were initially rejected by depositories but corporate action successfully completed
  • Shares now available for trading on NSE and BSE
  • Shares rank pari passu with existing Equity Shares of the Company
  • Information available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Fusion Micro Finance Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [KAYA] Kaya Ltd Appoints Piyush Jaiswal as Chief Operating Officer - North & West
item.description:
Kaya Ltd has appointed Mr. Piyush Jaiswal as the Chief Operating Officer - North & West, Senior Management Personnel of the company, effective April 6, 2026. Piyush Jaiswal is a seasoned business leader with over a decade of experience in various sectors including Automotive Technology, mobility, hospitality, ed-tech, healthcare retail, and telecom. He has held leadership roles at Spinny, WhiteHat Jr (Byju’s Group), Meru Mobility, OYO Hotels & Homes, Clove Dental, and IDEA Cellular. His core strengths include multi-city P&L leadership, sales strategy, demand-supply alignment, customer experience excellence, and operational scaling with discipline. He holds a PGDM in International Business (Sales & Marketing) from IMT Ghaziabad and a Bachelor of Engineering in Electrical Engineering from PEC University of Technology, Chandigarh.

  • Appointment of Mr. Piyush Jaiswal as the Chief Operating Officer - North & West
  • Piyush Jaiswal's vast experience in various sectors
  • His core strengths in multi-city P&L leadership, sales strategy, and operational scaling

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kaya Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BAJAJHLDNG] Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd to Approve Q4 and FY 2025-26 Financial Results in May 2026 Board Meeting
item.description:
Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 7 May 2026 to consider and approve the standalone and consolidated financial audited results for the quarter and financial year ended 31 March 2026. The meeting will also recommend dividend on equity shares, if any, for the financial year ended 31 March 2026. In compliance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015, the trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company is closed from 1 April 2026 till 9 May 2026 for designated persons and their immediate relatives.

  • Bajaj Holdings & Investment Ltd to approve Q4 and FY 2025-26 financial results on 7 May 2026
  • The Board will recommend dividend on equity shares, if any, for the financial year ended 31 March 2026
  • Trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company is closed from 1 April 2026 till 9 May 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BAJAJ HOLDINGS & INVESTMENT LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [POWERGRID] POWERGRID Chairman & MD, Shri Burra Vamsi Rama Mohan, Assumes Additional Charge as Director (Projects)
item.description:
Shri Burra Vamsi Rama Mohan, the Chairman & Managing Director of Power Grid Corporation of India Ltd (POWERGRID), has been entrusted with an additional charge for the post of Director (Projects) for a period of 3 months starting from 1st April, 2026. This decision was made in accordance with the Ministry of Power (MoP) Order dated 6th April, 2026. The announcement was made in terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Shri Burra Vamsi Rama Mohan, Chairman & Managing Director of POWERGRID, given additional charge as Director (Projects)
  • Additional charge for a period of 3 months starting from 1st April, 2026
  • Decision made in accordance with the Ministry of Power (MoP) Order dated 6th April, 2026
  • Announcement made in terms of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POWER GRID CORPORATION OF INDIA LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAHSCOOTER] Maharashtra Scooters Ltd to Approve Q4 and FY2025-26 Financial Results in April Board Meeting
item.description:
Maharashtra Scooters Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on 22 April 2026 to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended 31 March 2026. The meeting will also recommend dividend on equity shares, if any, for the financial year ended 31 March 2026. In addition, the company has informed that the trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company is closed from Wednesday, 1 April 2026 till Friday, 24 April 2026 for designated persons and their immediate relatives/dependents, in accordance with the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 and the Company's Code of Conduct.

  • Maharashtra Scooters Ltd to approve Q4 and FY2025-26 financial results on 22 April 2026
  • The Board will recommend dividend on equity shares, if any, for the financial year ended 31 March 2026
  • Trading window for dealing in the securities of the Company is closed from 1 April 2026 to 24 April 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHARASHTRA SCOOTERS LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [STARHFL] Star Housing Finance Suspects Phantom Loan Book of Rs. 120 Crore, Initiates External Audit
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Star Housing Finance Ltd. has filed a Fraud Monitoring Report-1 with the National Housing Bank, as per RBI's Master Direction on Frauds, due to a snap audit report issued by the National Housing Bank. The report suspects a phantom loan book amounting to Rs. 120 Crore. The company is quick to clarify that these findings are currently suspected and have not yet been established. To further investigate the matter, Star Housing Finance is in the process of appointing an independent auditor to conduct a thorough external audit.

  • Star Housing Finance Ltd. has filed a Fraud Monitoring Report-1 with the National Housing Bank
  • The report suspects a phantom loan book amounting to Rs. 120 Crore
  • The findings are currently suspected and not yet established
  • The company is appointing an independent auditor for a thorough external audit

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Star Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Fraud Monitoring Report
